text.title: Business Storytelling Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-framework
step.action: Decision narrative → Pyramid. Story with tension → SCQA. Change story with cause-chain → Pixar.

step.name: draft-central-claim
step.action: Write a 1-sentence central claim ≤200 chars that survives standalone reading.
step.decision-gate: If claim cannot be stated in one sentence, the analysis is not done.

step.name: assemble-supports
step.action: Map evidence to 3 MECE supports for Pyramid; or to S-C-Q-A for SCQA; or to causal chain for Pixar.

step.name: so-what-pass
step.action: Add 'which means' implication to every fact. Reject body without so_what_N parity.
step.decision-gate: If any fact lacks implication, return to step 3.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `validate-business-storytelling.py`. Smoke-test by reading aloud in 30 seconds.
